threads.author: developer
threads.message: Kernel rewritten with shared memory optimization. Block-based architecture with block_size and threads parameters. Extended autotune configs.

threads.author: orchestrator
threads.message: BLOCKED: Tilelang constraint violation - fragment buffers cannot be indexed with symbolic ranges (block_size). The attempted blocked/shared-memory approach fails with: 'Loop variable i in a T.Parallel loop with symbolic range is used to index a local/fragment buffer, which is not allowed'. The original working kernel uses a simpler 1-thread-1-output approach. Need to explore alternative optimization strategies that don't require fragment buffer indexing with T.Parallel.
